resources.name: Kong 3.4.2 Custom Plugins
resources.description: Automated smoke tests for the local Kong 3.4.2 Docker Compose setup and custom Lua plugin rocks.

resources.name: Health - Kong status API is ready

Proxy - canary override forces stable
